title: Reflex Budget Check
readyDescription:
Answer questions about budgeting habits!
You have {{time}} seconds for each question.
readyTip: You have {{total}} questions with {{time}} seconds each!

questions.question: What's the best way to track your spending?
questions.explanation: Tracking daily expenses helps you understand where your money goes and stay within budget

questions.question: How often should you check your budget?

options.text: Only when you run out of money

questions.explanation: Regular budget reviews help you stay on track and adjust spending as needed

questions.question: What should you do with receipts?
questions.explanation: Saving receipts helps you verify expenses and track your spending accurately

questions.question: What's the first step in planning expenses?
questions.explanation: Knowing your income is essential before planning how to allocate your money

questions.question: When should you update your budget?
questions.explanation: Updating your budget when circumstances change keeps it relevant and useful
